title: Add URL shortener web app (React UI + Express API, in-memory store)
description: Introduces a small full-stack URL shortener under apps/url-shortener. Frontend is a React + Vite single-page UI that lets the user paste a long URL and receive a shortened https://short.local/<code> link. Backend is an Express server exposing POST /api/shorten and GET /:code (302 redirect). Storage is a simple in-memory Map (no DB), seeded empty on each boot. Adds a Vitest unit suite for the encoder and a Playwright smoke test that creates a link and follows the redirect. Includes a README with `npm run dev` instructions.
author: fullstack-dev
